name: @nihongo-slopless/textlint-adapter-experimental
description: Experimental textlint adapters that port 12 nihongo-slopless rules (long-sentence, same-ending, chat-response-leakage, placeholder, hidden-unicode-controls, headline-decoration, excessive-parentheses, empty-conclusion, citation-needed, actorless-action, buzzword-density, list-intro-padding). Prototype only. Not intended for npm publish.

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check long-sentence.js && node --check same-ending.js && node --check chat-response-leakage.js && node --check placeholder.js && node --check hidden-unicode-controls.js && node --check headline-decoration.js && node --check excessive-parentheses.js && node --check empty-conclusion.js && node --check citation-needed.js && node --check actorless-action.js && node --check buzzword-density.js && node --check list-intro-padding.js && node --check smoke-test.js && node --check runtime-test.js && node --check preset-resolution-test.js
